stimulus: Because a generation of cicada nymphs ______blank seventeen years to mature underground, it’s possible for an entire brood to emerge from the soil in a single summer, filling forests with their high-pitched calls.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is the best answer. The convention being tested is subject-verb agreement. The singular verb "needs" agrees in number with the singular subject "a generation of cicada nymphs."

Choice A is incorrect because the plural verb "need" doesn’t agree in number with the singular subject. Choice C is incorrect because the plural verb "are needing" doesn’t agree in number with the singular subject. Choice D is incorrect because the plural verb "have needed" doesn’t agree in number with the singular subject.
